notes: Gen1 (model C5010S / R9861600D01C). Power input on the unit is a DC barrel jack from an included external adapter (12V DC, 4.2A min); the '110/220V AC' spec refers to the adapter's mains input, not a connector on the unit itself. S/PDIF is confirmed TOSLINK optical (not coaxial). No RS-232 port documented. Desktop form factor — not rack-mountable. The ATM090T-A190 adapter (19V/4.74A) is for the Gen2 only and does not apply here.

ports.name: USB-C (Rear)
ports.note: USB 2.0, rear panel; for USB peripherals/cameras

ports.name: USB-A (Front)
ports.note: USB 2.0, front panel; for ClickShare Button

ports.name: Audio Line Out (Analog)
ports.note: 3.5mm mini jack, analog stereo line output

ports.name: Power In
ports.note: 12V DC, 4.2A min; supplied by included external Class 2 power adapter (110-220V AC mains input on adapter side)
